'''鈭歭-v-j-ng''' ('''kalavjengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:long|long]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:long|long]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-v-j-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kalavjengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavjengoko|thilavjengoko]] || [[word:jilavjengoko|jilavjengoko]] || [[word:shilavjengoko|shilavjengoko]] || [[word:kilavjengoko|kilavjengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
